id_of_the_workflow_to_execute: ID of the workflow to execute
select_a_variable_to_pass_to_the_child: Select a variable to pass to the child workflow
this_is_a_core_workflow_block_execute_an: This is a core workflow block. Execute another workflow as a block in your workflow. Enter the input variable to pass to the child workflow.
this_variable_will_be_available_as_start: This variable will be available as start.input in the child workflow
variable_reference_to_pass_to_the_child_: Variable reference to pass to the child workflow
